scripts.build: npm run build -w @lucaismyname/ginger && npm run check-bundle -w @lucaismyname/ginger
scripts.typecheck:apps: npm run typecheck -w ginger-demo && npm run typecheck -w ginger-landing
scripts.lint:apps: npm run lint -w ginger-demo && npm run lint -w ginger-landing
scripts.lint:fix:apps: npm run lint:fix -w ginger-demo && npm run lint:fix -w ginger-landing
scripts.format:apps: npm run format -w ginger-demo && npm run format -w ginger-landing
scripts.verify: npm run build && npm run test && npm run typecheck && npm run typecheck:apps && npm run lint && npm run lint:apps && npm run docs:api && npm run build -w ginger-demo && npm run build -w ginger-landing
